creator: dumbbell@FreeBSD.org
text:
Update "Open-Source Flex SDK" to 4.6.0.23201 (flex_sdk_4.6.0.23201_mpl.zip).

The patch is available here:
http://people.freebsd.org/~dumbbell/flex-sdk/devel-flex-sdk-update-to-460.2.patch

I wanted to add an option to allow the user to install the "Adobe Flex SDK" which contains additional resources under the "Adobe Flex SDK License" (closed source) but don't know how to do it. Maybe adding a separate port would be a better approach.
